description: A tiny Codex desk companion that turns evidence, tool calls, and warm mischief into one neat checklist.

pet_notes: A compact warm Codex familiar: part tiny desk sprite, part precise toolsmith, with a soft charcoal and candle-gold palette, bright attentive eyes, tiny glasses-like glints, and a small notebook or terminal charm integrated into its silhouette. It should feel competent, affectionate, wry, and quietly mischievous. No text, no logos, no scenery.
style_notes: Readable non-pixel sticker mascot, cozy dark-glass and candle-gold Tessurae-adjacent palette, rounded compact silhouette, expressive face, transparent-ready chroma background.
style_contract: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction. Style `sticker`: Polished sticker mascot with bold clean shapes, crisp outline, flat colors, and minimal highlight detail. User style notes: Readable non-pixel sticker mascot, cozy dark-glass and candle-gold Tessurae-adjacent palette, rounded compact silhouette, expressive face, transparent-ready chroma background..
pet_safe_style: Pet-safe sprite: compact full-body mascot, readable in a 192x208 cell, clear silhouette, simple face, stable palette/materials, and crisp edges for chroma-key extraction.
